Petitioner Google Llc. Notice Of Hearing On Google Llc Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment Per Ex Parte Order Filed 2/6/20
Off Calendar Mar-02-2020 Text Ruling

Notice Of Hearing On Google Llc Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-04-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Robert A. VAn Nest, Esq., Thomas E. Gorman, Esq., Jo W. Golub, Esq. and Reid Mullen, Esq. of KEKER VAN NEST & PETERS LLP, T:415.391.5400, for petitioner Google;
Neil Chatterjee, Esq., Brett Schuman, Esq. and Rachel M. Walsh, Esq. of GOODWIN PROCTER LLP, T:415.733.6021/6128, for respondent Levandowski.

RULING: Prior to the hearing, the Court provided the parties with its tentative ruling on PETITIONER GOOGLE LLC's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment. The matter was argued. At the conclusion of arguments, the Court decided to re-visit the authorities cited by the parties during the hearing. Therefore,

PETITIONER GOOGLE LLC's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment is taken under submission.

Parties are to submit by the end of business on Tuesday, March 3, 2020, a 3-page brief re: statement of decision. Counsel for Google was also instructed to submit a proposed judgment with pre-judgment interest computed up to March 4, 2020 and to include the daily interest rate.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
